steps.expected: Source list includes entries with type 'factory_session'
steps.observed: discover_sources() returned 663 total sources, 341 with type='factory_session' under ~/.factory/sessions/<encoded-cwd>/
All factory_session paths match pattern, e.g. /home/matthewmurray/.factory/sessions/-home-matthewmurray-projects-arcane-web/781244f7-f4ea-4a11-a963-c92e7d71e014.jsonl

evidence.codeInspection: discover_sources() in src/ingest.py iterates FACTORY_SESSIONS subdirectories and globs *.jsonl, appending ('factory_session', path)

steps.action: Run pytest -k factory (12 tests in TestParseFactoryJsonl + TestDeriveProjectSessions)
steps.expected: All factory parser tests pass, covering: message extraction, skipping session_start/session_end/todo_state, skipping thinking blocks
steps.observed: 12 tests passed, 0 failed. Tests cover: test_parse_factory_messages, test_factory_skips_non_message_types, test_factory_skips_thinking_blocks, test_factory_skips_only_thinking_messages

steps.action: Verify test_factory_skips_non_message_types covers session_start, session_end, todo_state
steps.expected: Synthetic JSONL with session_start, todo_state, session_end; only 'message' type extracted
steps.observed: Test creates JSONL with session_start, message (user), todo_state, session_end — asserts len(records)==1 and content=='Hello'

steps.expected: Thinking content blocks are filtered out, only text blocks extracted
steps.observed: test_factory_skips_thinking_blocks: message with thinking+text blocks → only 'Visible response' extracted. test_factory_skips_only_thinking_messages: message with only thinking blocks → 0 records

steps.expected: Project is derived from session_start.cwd field
steps.observed: Test passes: session_start with cwd='/home/user/my-project' → records[0]['project'] == '/home/user/my-project'

steps.expected: Project is None if no session_start record
steps.observed: Test passes: without session_start, records[0]['project'] is None

steps.expected: derive_project() returns None for Factory sessions paths (cwd is used instead)

steps.action: Query production DB for factory project names
steps.expected: Real projects derived correctly from cwd
steps.observed: SELECT DISTINCT project FROM messages WHERE source_tool='factory' returns: /home, /home/matthewmurray, /home/matthewmurray/claude-memory, /home/matthewmurray/projects, /home/matthewmurray/projects/alpha-test, /home/matthewmurray/projects/arcane-web
Test passes: asserts all(r['source_tool'] == 'factory' for r in records)

steps.action: Query production DB: SELECT DISTINCT source_tool FROM messages WHERE source_file LIKE '%/.factory/sessions/%'
Query production DB: SELECT source_tool, COUNT(*) FROM messages WHERE source_tool='factory' GROUP BY source_tool
steps.expected: Confirms factory records exist with correct tagging

evidence.dbQuery: SELECT DISTINCT source_tool FROM messages WHERE source_file LIKE '%/.factory/sessions/%' → factory

steps.expected: Multi-block content with text, tool_use blocks extracts correctly
steps.observed: Test passes: content with [text('First part'), tool_use, text('Second part')] → 'First part\n\nSecond part'

steps.action: Verify extract_text_content is used by parse_factory_jsonl
steps.expected: Factory parser delegates to extract_text_content() for content extraction
steps.observed: Code inspection confirms parse_factory_jsonl calls extract_text_content(message) at line ~215 of ingest.py

steps.action: Verify existing extract_text_content tests cover edge cases
steps.expected: Tests for string content, list of blocks, none input, empty blocks
steps.observed: TestExtractTextContent class has 5 tests: string_content, list_of_blocks, none_input, empty_string_content, empty_blocks — all pass

steps.expected: session_id extracted from session_start record's 'id' field and applied to all messages
steps.observed: Test passes: session_start with id='abcd-1234-factory-session' → records[0]['session_id'] == 'abcd-1234-factory-session'

steps.action: Verify session_id propagation in production DB
steps.observed: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) FROM messages WHERE source_tool='factory' AND session_id IS NOT NULL → 331 distinct sessions

steps.action: Verify code propagates session_id to all messages
steps.expected: parse_factory_jsonl sets session_id once from session_start, applies to all subsequent messages
steps.observed: Code inspection: session_id is set at session_start, then included in every record dict

evidence.dbQuery: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) FROM messages WHERE source_tool='factory' AND session_id IS NOT NULL → 331

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 6 passed, 0 failed. All 12 factory-related pytest tests pass. Production DB confirms 5795 factory messages across 331 sessions with correct source_tool tagging and project derivation from session_start.cwd.
